title: arbitrary-send-eth
description: VulnerableBank.emergencyDrain() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#38-45) sends eth to arbitrary user Dangerous calls: - (success,None) = address(msg.sender).call{value: amount}() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#41)
collection_notes: Derived during normalization from source security and compliance reports.

title: reentrancy-eth
description: Reentrancy in VulnerableBank.withdraw() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#21-32): External calls: - (success,None) = address(msg.sender).call{value: amount}() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#25) State variables written after the call(s): - balances[msg.sender] = 0 (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#28) VulnerableBank.balances (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#5) can be used in cross function reentrancies: - VulnerableBank.balances (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#5) - VulnerableBank.deposit() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#12-19) - VulnerableBank.withdraw() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#21-32)
collection_notes: Derived during normalization from source security and compliance reports.

title: reentrancy-benign
description: Reentrancy in VulnerableBank.withdraw() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#21-32): External calls: - (success,None) = address(msg.sender).call{value: amount}() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#25) State variables written after the call(s): - totalDeposits -= amount (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#29)
collection_notes: Derived during normalization from source security and compliance reports.

title: reentrancy-events
description: Reentrancy in VulnerableBank.withdraw() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#21-32): External calls: - (success,None) = address(msg.sender).call{value: amount}() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#25) Event emitted after the call(s): - Withdrawn(msg.sender,amount) (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#31)
collection_notes: Derived during normalization from source security and compliance reports.
